headline: Why One Real Estate Fund Dumped $62 Million of Cousins Properties Stock

headline: XLRE Hits 11% Gain This Year; Can the Payout Stay Safe
summary: The Real Estate Select Sector SPDR Fund (NYSEARCA:XLRE) is the cheapest way to own the REIT slice of the S&P 500, with an expense ratio of just 8 basis points and a portfolio that pays out income four times a year. XLRE distributed roughly $1.39 per share across 2025, and the Q1 2026 payment of ... XLRE Hits 11% Gain This Year; Can the Payout Stay Safe

headline: What to Know About This Fund's $4 Million Exit From SmartStop Self Storage

headline: Is Core Scientific (CORZ) Using Veteran Data Center Talent To Redefine Its AI Infrastructure Strategy?
summary: Core Scientific, Inc. recently appointed Steve Smith, the 70-year-old CEO of Zayo Group and former Equinix CEO and President, to its Board of Directors and Nominating and Corporate Governance Committee, adding more than 35 years of data center and digital infrastructure leadership to its governance bench. His track record in scaling Equinix through extensive acquisitions and his current role at a global internet network provider underscore Core Scientific’s emphasis on deep data center...
